description_long: This is a cylindrical bottle with a slightly tapered midsection and a flat, circular top and bottom. The bottle is primarily a pale yellow color with orange accents, including a horizontal band near the top and bottom and a vertical label area. The top and bottom surfaces are gray, suggesting a metallic or plastic cap and base. The label features some abstract orange graphics and a block of vertical text, though the text is not fully legible. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible signs of damage or wear. The bottle is likely made of plastic or aluminum, commonly found as a beverage container in urban environments.
description: A pale yellow cylindrical bottle with orange accents, gray top and bottom, and abstract label graphics. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label area with vertical orange text and a horizontal orange band near the top.
description_view_1: Side view with less visible label detail, mostly showing the pale yellow body and orange border.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring an abstract orange graphic, possibly a logo or design element, with minimal text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large orange swoosh graphic and no visible text.
attribute_label_or_branding: Vertical orange text and abstract orange graphics on a pale yellow background; text is not fully legible.
